skill1.kitLine: Activates after 100 normal attack(s). Affects self. Elemental Advantage Attack Damage ▲ 30.23% for 3 sec.
skill1.where: skill1[0] — trigger hitCount 100, target self, buff elemAdvantageDamagePct 30.23 dur 3
skill1.note: Damage-Up-bucket entry; active ONLY with elemental advantage (Fire vs Fire-weak boss). Inert on the neutral/partless scope-lock boss (⚑1). Value 30.23 = L10.

skill1.kitLine: Activates after landing 100 normal attack(s). Affects the enemy within attack range nearest to the crosshair. Deals 112.37% of final ATK as damage.
skill1.where: skill1[1] — trigger hitCount 100, target enemy, flatDamage atkPct 112.37
skill1.note: Function-type skill damage: crit at caster rate (engine default), never core, noRange automatic for flatDamage, FB by landing timing. Proc cadence depends on MG fire rate; reloadFrames 171 unverified datamine (⚑2). Value 112.37 = L10.

skill2.kitLine: Activates at the start of battle. Affects self. Damage dealt to Shield ▲ 700.5% continuously.
skill2.note: No shield-damage StatKey in the override schema; scope-lock boss is partless (no shield), so this buff moves no damage (inert). Documented skip, not a silent drop. Value 700.5 = L10.

skill2.kitLine: Activates when entering Burst stage 3. Affects all Fire Code allies. ATK ▲ 25.03% of the skill user's ATK for 10 sec.
skill2.where: skill2[0] — trigger stageEnter stage 3, target alliesOfElement Fire, buff casterAtkPct 25.03 dur 10
skill2.note: Flat caster-static-ATK add via casterAtkPct (scales off caster's ATK at cast time, not snapshot of current ATK). Value 25.03 = L10.

burst.kitLine: Affects all Fire Code allies. Creates a Shield equal to 13.44% of the skill user's final Max HP for 10 sec.
burst.where: burst[0] effect[0] — trigger burstCast, target alliesOfElement Fire, shield maxHpPct 13.44 dur 10
burst.note: Event-only: no HP pool modeled in v1; fires shielded triggers only (⚑3). Shield itself deals no damage. Value 13.44 = L10.

burst.kitLine: Attack damage ▲ 48.02% for 10 sec. (all Fire Code allies, same burst cast)
burst.note: Damage-Up bucket; applies to all Fire Code allies for 10s on burst cast. Value 48.02 = L10.

burst.kitLine: Affects all enemies. Deals 990.2% of final ATK as damage.
burst.where: burst[1] — trigger burstCast, target enemy, flatDamage atkPct 990.2
burst.note: Burst nuke: crit at caster rate, never core, noRange, FB-exempt by cast-instant timing (lands before Full Burst window begins). Value 990.2 = L10.

documentedConfounds.text: skill1: Elemental Advantage Attack Damage ▲ 30.23% is active only with elemental advantage (Fire vs a Fire-weak boss); inert on a non-advantaged/neutral boss (⚑1)
documentedConfounds.why: Scope-lock boss is partless/neutral — no elemental advantage applies, so this buff contributes zero damage in the graded scenario. It is correctly modeled but inert by context, not a missing mechanic.

documentedConfounds.text: skill1: the 112.37% proc cadence (hitCount 100) depends on MG fire rate; reloadFrames 171 is unverified datamine (⚑2)
documentedConfounds.why: If reloadFrames 171 is wrong, the time-to-100-hits shifts, directly changing how many S1 procs (both the elemAdvantage buff and the 112.37% nuke) land in a 180s fight. This is a direct damage-input uncertainty that could move the ratio.

documentedConfounds.text: burst: the 13.44% caster-Max-HP shield is event-only (no HP pool modeled in v1); fires shielded triggers only (⚑3)
documentedConfounds.why: The shield deals no damage and the scope-lock boss has no shield-break or shielded-trigger mechanics that would interact with it. Absence of an HP pool does not affect any damage calculation in the graded scenario.

documentedConfounds.text: HAND-AUTHORED from kit prose (NOT measured/hand-tuned against a real fight). Every ⚑ is an UNMEASURED estimate; record against a real fight before trusting any number.
documentedConfounds.why: No measured validation exists for this unit. All timing assumptions (hitCount cadence, FB-exempt cast-instant nuke, stageEnter trigger alignment) are prose-derived hypotheses, not confirmed against observed fight data.

authorIntentSummary: The override is hand-authored directly from kit prose with no measured fight validation. All five damage-relevant kit lines are modeled as blocks: S1 elemAdvantage self-buff (inert on neutral boss), S1 flat-damage proc at hitCount 100, S2 casterAtkPct team buff on B3 entry, burst attackDamagePct team buff, and burst flat-damage nuke (FB-exempt by cast-instant timing). S2's shield-damage buff is documented-unmodeled as inert (no shield on scope-lock boss). The primary open risk is ⚑2: reloadFrames 171 is unverified datamine and directly controls S1 proc cadence, making it the most likely source of a ratio gap if wrong.
